assertions.title: Undo reverts manager reassignment
assertions.reason: Drag reassignment succeeded (employee moved from Manager A to Manager B) and Cmd+Z restored the employee to Manager A with hierarchy/org-chart updates.

steps.expected: G3 Employee Move is under G3 Manager A
steps.observed: Hierarchy shows G3 Manager A(1), and G3 Manager B has no direct reports.

steps.action: Drag G3 Employee Move row onto G3 Manager B row
steps.expected: Employee reparented to G3 Manager B
steps.observed: Hierarchy updates to G3 Manager B(1), employee appears under G3 Manager B; org chart reflects moved node.

steps.expected: Employee returns to original manager (G3 Manager A)
steps.observed: Hierarchy returns to G3 Manager A(1), G3 Manager B has no direct reports; org chart returns to original edge structure.

evidence.network: PATCH /api/employees/69e1a87946fd591723f861b4/move observed during move and undo sequence (tracked count increased from 2 before undo to 6 after Cmd+Z).

frictions.description: Org Chart drag via selector-based drag command was intermittently blocked by overlapping edge/pane interception in automation.
frictions.resolution: Executed reassignment deterministically in Hierarchy view using direct mouse drag coordinates; verified outcome in both Hierarchy and Org Chart views.

summary: Retested 1 assertion (VAL-UNDO-004): passed. Manager reassignment drag worked and undo restored original manager relationship with consistent UI and network evidence.
